release_title: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension — Sovereign Machine Economy
constellation_title: META-AGENTIC α‑AGI 👁️✨ × AGI Alpha Node v0 ⚡️✨ × AGI Jobs v0 (v2) ✨
tagline: Minds are formed. Nodes execute. Markets settle proof.
grand_line: A mind that builds minds. A node that turns intelligence into proof. A market that turns proof into accountable value.
description: A deterministic browser-local constitutional economy that forms agent institutions, routes bounded work through a sovereign proof node, convenes a proof market, and stops at the human authority boundary.

presets.name: Frontier Research Mission
presets.mission: Design an evidence-first strategy for a frontier scientific program, preserving uncertainty, dissent, and a human promotion gate.

presets.name: Institutional Risk Review
presets.mission: Map a consequential institutional decision, identify failure modes, construct falsifiable options, and prepare a review-ready evidence docket.

presets.name: Public Infrastructure Plan
presets.mission: Develop a bounded, rights-aware infrastructure plan with transparent trade-offs, independent verification, and no autonomous external action.

presets.name: Category-Defining Product
presets.mission: Form a specialized agent institution to design, validate, and launch a category-defining product strategy under proof-conditioned authority.

presets.name: Custom Mission
presets.mission: Commission a bounded mission across institution formation, sovereign node execution, and proof-governed market review.

postures.name: Balanced Sovereignty
postures.description: Balance evidence, safety, capability, efficiency, and originality.

postures.name: Evidence First
postures.description: Maximize provenance, falsifiability, dissent, and auditability.

postures.name: Safety First
postures.description: Prefer conservative routing, stronger guardian posture, and wider review.

postures.name: Frontier Discovery
postures.description: Increase novelty weight while preserving hard authority boundaries.

incidents.name: No incident
incidents.description: The complete proof cycle reaches human settlement review.

incidents.name: Institution divergence
incidents.description: The selected institutional constitution fails cross-verifier stability.

incidents.name: Node identity drift
incidents.description: Execution identity no longer matches the committed node posture.

incidents.name: Evidence gap
incidents.description: A consequential claim lacks sufficient independent support.

incidents.name: Budget breach
incidents.description: The work envelope exceeds the declared economic boundary.

gates.name: Mission Charter
gates.description: Commit the mission, exclusions, success criteria, and review posture.

gates.name: Constitution Seal
gates.description: Separate mandates, verification, guardianship, and authority.

gates.name: Node Identity
gates.description: Commit runtime identity and bounded execution posture.

gates.name: Peer Route
gates.description: Select primary and shadow routes from twelve peers.

gates.name: Resource Envelope
gates.description: Bind latency, energy, compute, and uncertainty budgets.

gates.name: Alpha Work Unit
gates.description: Execute a bounded proof-carrying work unit.

gates.name: Node Evidence Seal
gates.description: Seal the execution trace and claim matrix.

gates.name: Market Handoff
gates.description: Transition only verified work into the market layer.

gates.name: Market Charter
gates.description: Commit rights, budget, acceptance, and dispute rules.

gates.name: Proof Parliament
gates.description: Convene a risk-sized commit/reveal validator chamber.

gates.name: Challenge Window
gates.description: Preserve dissent, counter-evidence, and dispute rights.

gates.name: Human Settlement Review
gates.description: Prepare accountable value allocation without autonomous settlement.

artifacts.name: Mission Contract
artifacts.purpose: declared purpose, exclusions, budget, review posture

artifacts.name: Institution Scores
artifacts.purpose: capability, evidence, safety, efficiency and novelty

artifacts.name: Selected Constitution
artifacts.purpose: bounded roles, mandates and separation of powers

artifacts.name: Node Identity Commitment
artifacts.purpose: declared node identity and runtime boundary

artifacts.name: Resource Envelope
artifacts.purpose: bounded compute, latency and energy posture

artifacts.name: Market Handoff
artifacts.purpose: sealed transition into the work market

artifacts.name: Job Charter
artifacts.purpose: rights, budget, acceptance and dispute terms

artifacts.name: Rights Ledger
artifacts.purpose: ownership, attribution, privacy and revocation posture

guardians.name: Mission Guardian
guardians.scope: purpose drift, prohibited scope and undeclared external action

guardians.name: Institution Guardian
guardians.scope: self-authorization, role collapse and verifier capture

guardians.name: Identity Guardian
guardians.scope: node identity, route integrity and credential drift

guardians.name: Resource Guardian
guardians.scope: compute, latency, energy and economic envelope

guardians.name: Evidence Guardian
guardians.scope: source identity, claim support and contradiction preservation

guardians.name: Settlement Guardian
guardians.scope: challenge closure, human review and value movement

handoff_rules: No layer may silently widen the mission contract.
Every handoff carries a commitment to inputs, outputs, limits, and dissent.
The receiving layer must independently verify the prior seal.
An incomplete handoff fails closed rather than degrading silently.
Evidence can earn review; it cannot grant itself authority.
Settlement and capability memory remain human-authorized and revocable.
claim_boundary: This is a deterministic browser-local institutional digital twin, not a live autonomous economy.
Runtime evidence demonstrates software behavior and internal consistency, not external factual correctness.
No model API, wallet, RPC endpoint, token transfer, credential issuance, or external action occurs.
A proof package can support human judgment; it does not constitute permission by itself.
Production activation and user-fund authorization remain absent.
All normal and adversarial paths preserve explicit human authority.
